data.title: Microservices Infrastructure
data.description: A distributed architecture where each service is self-contained and independently deployable.
data.technical_spec: Uses container orchestration tools like Kubernetes to manage service deployment.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Efficient distribution of incoming network traffic across multiple servers.
data.technical_spec: Employs global load balancers with advanced algorithms for traffic management.

data.title: Caching Systems
data.description: Utilization of edge caching to minimize latency and improve access speeds.
data.technical_spec: Implements CDN services and data caching solutions like Memcached.

data.title: Serverless Computing
data.description: Execution of code without infrastructure management, allowing automatic scaling, and event-driven architecture.
data.technical_spec: Uses Functions as a Service (FaaS) like Google Cloud Functions.

data.title: Distributed Database Systems
data.description: Stores data across multiple nodes to ensure high availability and resilience.
data.technical_spec: Deploys scalable NoSQL databases such as Bigtable, Spanner.
